parameters.query:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT listmonk_sync_queue_id
  FROM public.listmonk_sync_queue
  WHERE status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND available_at <= now()
  ORDER BY created_at
  LIMIT 10
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE public.listmonk_sync_queue q
  SET status = 'processing',
      locked_at = now(),
      attempts = attempts + 1,
      updated_at = now()
  FROM picked
  WHERE q.listmonk_sync_queue_id = picked.listmonk_sync_queue_id
  RETURNING
    q.listmonk_sync_queue_id,
    q.event_type,
    q.member_email_id,
    q.email_normalized,
    q.listmonk_list_id,
    q.source,
    q.details,
    q.status,
    q.attempts
)
SELECT
  listmonk_sync_queue_id::text AS listmonk_sync_queue_id,
  event_type,
  member_email_id::text AS member_email_id,
  email_normalized,
  listmonk_list_id,
  source,
  details,
  status,
  attempts
FROM updated;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { email: $json.email_normalized, name: $json.subscriberName, status: 'enabled', lists: $json.listIds, preconfirm_subscriptions: true, attribs: { signaturegate_member_email_id: $json.member_email_id, signaturegate_source: $json.source, signaturegate_queue_id: $json.queueId } } }}

={{ { email: $json.email_normalized, name: $json.subscriberName, status: 'enabled', lists: $json.listIds, preconfirm_subscriptions: true, attribs: { signaturegate_member_email_id: $json.member_email_id, signaturegate_source: $json.source, signaturegate_queue_id: $json.queueId } } }}
